title: Darkness
description:
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Dark[/gold].
Trigger the passive ability of all [gold]Dark[/gold] Orbs.
upgraded_description:
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Dark[/gold].
Trigger the passive ability of all [gold]Dark[/gold] Orbs twice.
notes: Channels a Dark Orb and then triggers its passive ability for all Dark Orbs in the queue. Upgrade makes the passive trigger twice instead of once.
